# Queer Guide - LLM Information File

## Project Overview
Queer Guide is a black-and-white, multilingual Progressive Web App (PWA) that maps queer-friendly locations, events, products/services, and knowledge (Tags/Wiki) around the world. It includes country/city profiles with local LGBTQ+ rights, news, weather, and travel data.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite
- UI: Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, shadcn/ui components
- Backend: Supabase (Database, Auth, Storage, Edge Functions)
- Maps: Mapbox GL JS for location mapping and geocoding
- APIs: Foursquare Places, OpenWeather, Unsplash, RSS feeds
- State Management: TanStack React Query
- Routing: React Router DOM
- Internationalization: i18next, react-i18next
- Build Tool: Vite with performance optimizations
- PWA: Service Worker, offline functionality, manifest.json

## Core Features

### 1. Venues & Locations
- Queer-friendly bars, cafés, organizations, health services
- Mapbox integration for discovery
- Foursquare enrichment (hours, categories, ratings)
- Safe space indicators and accessibility info
- Check-in functionality and recent activity

### 2. Events
- LGBTQ+ events filterable by city, tag, date
- Calendar view and export functionality
- Auto-expiry after end date
- Markdown descriptions with image support
- RSVP links and organizer information

### 3. Marketplace
Split into Products and Services:
- Products: books, clothing, art, etc.
- Services: therapy, design, drag performances
- Tags for filtering (trans-owned, handmade, local)
- Verified contributor system

### 4. Directory & Community
- City/Country pages with LGBTQ+ rights data
- User profiles with pronouns, location, expertise
- Groups: regional or interest-based communities
- Tags system: markdown-based wiki articles
- News aggregation from RSS/API feeds

### 5. Travel & Booking
- Weather forecasts for cities
- Flight and hotel search integration
- Country-specific LGBTQ+ rights information
- Safe travel recommendations

## Architecture

### Database (Supabase)
Key tables:
- users, user_profiles (auth and user data)
- countries, cities (location hierarchy)
- venues, events (main content)
- products, services (marketplace)
- tags, content_tags (wiki system and categorization)
- groups, group_memberships (community features)
- news_articles, feeds (news aggregation)
- bookmarks, favorites (user preferences)

### Security & Access Control
- Row Level Security (RLS) enabled on all tables
- Role-based access: admin, moderator, contributor, user
- Authentication via Supabase Auth
- Content moderation workflow via submissions table

### Performance Optimizations
- Lazy loading of admin components
- React Query caching (5min stale, 10min gc)
- Service Worker with Cache First strategy for APIs
- Code splitting with manual chunks
- Image optimization and caching

### Offline Support (PWA)
- Service Worker handles fetch fallbacks
- IndexedDB/localStorage for offline data
- Background sync for queued actions
- Offline detection with user notifications

## File Structure
```
src/
├── components/           # Reusable UI components
│   ├── ui/              # shadcn/ui base components
│   ├── admin/           # Admin panel components
│   ├── auth/            # Authentication components
│   ├── layout/          # Header, Footer, navigation
│   └── [feature]/       # Feature-specific components
├── hooks/               # Custom React hooks
├── pages/               # Route components
├── i18n/                # Internationalization
├── lib/                 # Utilities and configs
└── integrations/        # External service integrations

supabase/
├── functions/           # Edge Functions
└── migrations/          # Database schema changes
```

## API Integrations

### External APIs
- Foursquare Places: Venue enrichment
- OpenWeather: City weather data
- Unsplash: Image sourcing and caching
- Mapbox: Geocoding and mapping
- RSS/API feeds: News aggregation

### Edge Functions
- fetch-news: Daily news parsing
- get-weather-forecast: Weather updates
- mapbox-geocoding: Location services
- import-*: CSV and API data imports
- search-flights/hotels: Travel booking
- send-bulk-email: Communication

## Design System
- Black and white theme with subtle rainbow accents
- HSL color system in index.css
- Semantic tokens (no direct colors in components)
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Accessibility features and controls
- Dark/light mode support

## Content Management
- Markdown support for descriptions
- Image upload and management via Supabase Storage
- Tag-based categorization system
- Content moderation workflow
- CSV import capabilities for bulk data

## Internationalization
Supported languages:
- English (en) - default
- Spanish (es)
- French (fr)
- German (de)
- Italian (it)
- Portuguese (pt)
- Russian (ru)
- Arabic (ar)
- Japanese (ja)
- Korean (ko)
- Chinese (zh)

## Development Guidelines
- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint configuration
- Component-driven development
- Semantic HTML and accessibility
- Performance monitoring hooks
- Error boundaries and fallbacks

## Key Features for LLMs to Understand
1. This is an LGBTQ+ focused application with safety and inclusivity as core values
2. Global scope with local community features
3. Real-time data from multiple external sources
4. Comprehensive admin system for content management
5. Progressive Web App with offline capabilities
6. Multilingual support for global accessibility
7. Community-driven content with moderation
8. Privacy-focused with user control over data

## Contact & Contribution
- Moderation system for community contributions
- Admin roles for content oversight
- User reporting and feedback systems
- Privacy-focused data handling

---
This file helps LLMs understand the Queer Guide codebase structure, features, and technical implementation for better assistance and code generation.
